reviews.comment:
Suelo cargar Axion o Shell. Fui al ACA porque la última vez la nafta de la Axion era mala. En el ACA flojo el servicio. No andan bien los Posnet y no pasan los pagos con tarjeta. Creo que no vuelvo.

(Translated by Google)
I usually fill up at Axion or Shell. I went to ACA because the gas at Axion was bad last time. The service at ACA is terrible. The card machines aren't working properly and they won't accept card payments. I don't think I'll be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvME9XbEhnEAE

reviews.comment:
La gente que atiende durante la mañana y la tarde excelentes , ahora el pibe que esta a la noche ,mamita querida !! Si no esta en el baño esta en el deposito si no es el deposito o el baño esta comiendo con el de seguridad y alguno de los playeros y por supuedto que primero va a terminar de comer antes de antenderte

(Translated by Google)
The staff who work mornings and afternoons are excellent, but the guy who works nights, oh my god! If he's not in the bathroom, he's in the storage room; if he's not in the storage room or the bathroom, he's eating with the security guard and one of the attendants, and of course, he'll finish eating before helping you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3czUyZ193RRAB

reviews.comment:
EL SERVICIO DE PLAYA ES OPTIMO PERO LA ATENCION DEL POLIRRUBRO DEJA MUCHO QUE DESEAR POR EL DESTRATO DE LAS EMPLEADAS

(Translated by Google)
The beach service is excellent, but the service at the general store leaves much to be desired due to the rude treatment by the employees.
